day4_night_start_2.name: Me
day4_night_start_2.text: *Tomorrow is Day 5. The deadline Seolhwa mentioned. ...What happens after five days?*

day4_night_phone_2.name: Me
day4_night_phone_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu: 'Could you come a little early tomorrow? There's something I need to talk to you about.'*

day4_night_phone_3.name: Me
day4_night_phone_3.text: *...I want to turn off the phone. But that would make them more suspicious.*

day4_night_eunsu_crack_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_night_eunsu_crack_2.text: "...{name}. Tomorrow... please come. I'll be waiting."

day4_night_eunsu_crack_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_night_eunsu_crack_3.text: "......I'm... honestly scared too. How long do I have to keep doing this..."

day4_night_eunsu_crack_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day4_night_eunsu_crack_4.text: "...Never mind. Forget it. It's nothing. See you tomorrow, {name}."

day4_night_eunsu_crack_5.name: Me
day4_night_eunsu_crack_5.text: *...The call ended. Ms. Park's voice was trembling. Is she also... unable to escape?*

day4_night_plan.name: Me
day4_night_plan.text: *Let me organize this. This school is experimenting on transfer students.*

day4_night_plan_2.name: Me
day4_night_plan_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu 'manages' the transfer students, Riin administers drugs, and Sea... surveillance? Or something more?*

day4_night_plan_branch.name: Me
day4_night_plan_branch.text: *I have enough evidence. Memory card, document photos, the underground lab... I just need to get this to the outside.*

day4_night_plan_branch_alt.name: Me
day4_night_plan_branch_alt.text: *Not enough evidence. But there's no more time to wait.*

day4_night_plan_escape.name: Me
day4_night_plan_escape.text: *Tomorrow, I'll find a gap and get out of school. I need to take Yuna too.*

day4_night_plan_expose.name: Me
day4_night_plan_expose.text: *Upload the evidence online. Report to the police. Let the world know the truth about this school.*

day4_night_plan_confront.name: Me
day4_night_plan_confront.text: *Ms. Eunsu, Riin, Sea... I'll face them directly. Ask them why they're doing this.*

day4_night_seolhwa_2.name: Lee Seolhwa
day4_night_seolhwa_2.text: "I was... Subject 07, one year ago. The only case where the experiment failed."

day4_night_seolhwa_3.name: Lee Seolhwa
day4_night_seolhwa_3.text: "The memory manipulation... had the opposite effect. The others lost their memories, but I ended up remembering everything."

day4_night_seolhwa_4.name: Lee Seolhwa
day4_night_seolhwa_4.text: "So they 'processed' me. Officially, a transfer. In reality..."

day4_night_seolhwa_5.name: Lee Seolhwa
day4_night_seolhwa_5.text: "...'Final processing' happens on the night of Day 5. You have to get out before then. Please."

day4_night_seolhwa_6.name: Lee Seolhwa
day4_night_seolhwa_6.text: "And... protect Yuna. She got dragged into this because of me."

day4_night_seolhwa_7.name: Me
day4_night_seolhwa_7.text: *...I opened my eyes. 4 AM. It's still dark outside. ...Tomorrow is here.*
